niche_research.methodology: Evaluated against: search volume, competition density, CPM rates, AI-content viability, monetization speed, algorithm performance

niches_evaluated.niche: Personal Finance for Millennials / Gen Z
niches_evaluated.search_demand: Very High — 'how to save money', 'investing for beginners', 'credit score tips' get 500K-5M monthly searches
niches_evaluated.competition: Medium — dominated by large channels but sub-niches (e.g. 'finance for side hustlers', 'zero-based budgeting') are underserved
niches_evaluated.cpm: $18-25 — one of the highest CPMs on YouTube (financial services advertisers)
niches_evaluated.ai_content_viability: High — evergreen scripts, no on-camera presenter needed, stock footage + text overlays work well
niches_evaluated.algorithm_performance: Strong — high watch time, saves, and shares; search-driven traffic compounds over time
niches_evaluated.monetization_beyond_adsense: Affiliate (Robinhood, Acorns, Personal Capital), digital products (budget templates), sponsorships
niches_evaluated.weakness: Requires factual accuracy — financial misinformation risk; E-E-A-T matters for Google/YouTube trust signals
niches_evaluated.recommendation: STRONG PICK — high CPM, evergreen, AI-producible, strong algorithm pull

niches_evaluated.search_demand: Very High and growing — 'how to use ChatGPT', 'best AI tools 2025', 'AI for work' trending upward
niches_evaluated.competition: High — many creators, but tool landscape changes fast meaning fresh content is always needed
niches_evaluated.ai_content_viability: Very High — can literally use AI to script videos about AI; screen recordings + voiceover format works perfectly
niches_evaluated.algorithm_performance: Excellent short-term — trending topic, high CTR; risk: content dates quickly as tools evolve
niches_evaluated.est_time_to_1k_subs: 2-4 months — fast-moving niche rewards early movers on new tool releases
niches_evaluated.monetization_beyond_adsense: Affiliate links for AI tool subscriptions (20-30% recurring commissions on tools like Jasper, Midjourney, etc.)
niches_evaluated.weakness: Content shelf life is short — tools change fast. Requires constant topic refresh.
niches_evaluated.recommendation: GOOD PICK for fast growth, less ideal for long-term passive income

niches_evaluated.search_demand: Medium-High — 'stoic philosophy', 'Marcus Aurelius quotes', 'stoicism for modern life' growing steadily
niches_evaluated.competition: Medium — several mid-size channels (100K-500K) but no dominant brand yet at the top
niches_evaluated.ai_content_viability: Very High — philosophical content is inherently evergreen, script-heavy, stock footage viable, no live footage needed
niches_evaluated.algorithm_performance: Strong long-tail — videos continue getting views for years; low post frequency works (1-2x/week)
niches_evaluated.weakness: Lower CPM limits ad revenue ceiling even with large audience
niches_evaluated.recommendation: SOLID for low-effort production but slower monetization path

niches_evaluated.search_demand: Very High — perennial top searches; 'passive income ideas', 'how to make money online' 1M+ monthly
niches_evaluated.competition: High — very saturated at the top level, but specific angles (e.g. 'passive income for software developers', 'AI-powered side hustles') have room
niches_evaluated.ai_content_viability: High — list-format and tutorial content works well with AI scripting and stock footage
niches_evaluated.algorithm_performance: High CTR naturally (money-related thumbnails), strong suggested video performance
niches_evaluated.monetization_beyond_adsense: High — affiliate income from platforms covered in videos, courses, consulting
niches_evaluated.weakness: Trust and credibility are hard to build as a new channel in this space; audience is skeptical
niches_evaluated.recommendation: GOOD but needs a differentiated angle to cut through saturation

niches_evaluated.search_demand: High — 'history mysteries', 'untold history', 'forgotten empires' consistently strong
niches_evaluated.competition: Medium — well-served by large channels (Oversimplified, Knowledgia) but short-form and specific era niches are open
niches_evaluated.ai_content_viability: Very High — AI voiceover + historical illustrations/stock footage is a proven format
niches_evaluated.algorithm_performance: Strong watch time (educational format, curiosity-driven), good Shorts crossover potential
niches_evaluated.monetization_beyond_adsense: Limited — books affiliate, Patreon for bonus content
niches_evaluated.weakness: Low CPM means high view counts needed for meaningful ad revenue
niches_evaluated.recommendation: GOOD for audience building but slow monetization

recommendation.winner: Personal Finance for Millennials / Gen Z
rationale: Highest CPM ($18-25) means every 1,000 views earns 3-5x more than history or philosophy niches
Evergreen content compounds — a video on 'emergency fund basics' gets views indefinitely
Affiliate income is substantial and recurring (fintech apps pay 20-40% commissions)
AI production is fully viable — no camera, no face, stock footage + professional voiceover
Sub-niche angle recommendation: 'Personal finance for tech workers and side hustlers' — avoids the most saturated angles

proposed_content_strategy.format: Explainer videos 8-12 minutes, AI voiceover (ElevenLabs Adam voice), stock footage from Pexels, auto-generated subtitles
proposed_content_strategy.posting_cadence: 3 videos/week for first 90 days, then 2/week once library is built
first_10_videos: 7 Things to Do With Your First $1,000
How to Build a 6-Month Emergency Fund in 12 Months
Index Funds vs ETFs: What Beginners Need to Know
The FIRE Movement Explained: Can You Really Retire Early?
5 Money Mistakes People Make in Their 20s
How to Negotiate Your Salary (Scripts That Work)
Roth IRA vs Traditional IRA: Which Is Better For You?
How Compound Interest Works (And Why It Matters Now)
proposed_content_strategy.shorts_strategy: Cut 45-60 second hooks from long-form videos — strong Shorts performance in finance niche
proposed_content_strategy.thumbnail_style: High contrast, bold number/stat in center, clean background, minimal text

monetization_timeline.month_1_3: Build content library, optimise SEO, no revenue
monetization_timeline.month_4_6: Approach 1K subs and 4K hours — apply for monetization

next_actions: Update settings.json with niche: 'personal finance tips'
Run niche_researcher.py to confirm scoring agrees with manual analysis
Generate first 3 video scripts via script_generator.py
Install ffmpeg and imagemagick (requires sudo) to enable video assembly
